scope: Funnelback upstream endpoints sent by funnelback-proxy-dev

non_calling_modules_inspected.note: Analytics-tracking middleware that wraps handlers; makes no Funnelback requests.
fetch(request) / fetch(newRequest) forward inbound requests through Vercel's edge chain to matching /api/* handler. Not Funnelback calls.

query_params.source: params: req.query — entire req.query object passed through to axios at api/search.js:165
query_params.note: Specific param names not enumerable from proxy code; whatever the FE sends is forwarded.

endpoints.response_transforms: Body returned to client unmodified (api/search.js:258). extractResultCount (api/search.js:43-54) parses 'totalMatching">N<' for analytics only.

callers.context: Main search handler; routed at /proxy/funnelback/search per vercel.json:5.

gaps: Full set of query parameter names is whatever FE sends; not enumerable from proxy code.
endpoints.notes: Timeout constant FUNNELBACK_TIMEOUT_MS = 5000 declared at api/search.js:27.

query_params.name: collection
query_params.note: Overridable by req.query — req.query is spread last (api/server.js:85-90).
Client-supplied params override hardcoded defaults of same name.

endpoints.response_transforms: Body returned to client unmodified (api/server.js:183). extractResultCount parsed for analytics only.

callers.context: Original /proxy/funnelback main handler. CLAUDE.md flags this on the deprecation watchlist as 'does nothing meaningful today.' vercel.json:4 still routes /proxy/funnelback to it.

gaps: Whether the route is still called by any active caller is not determinable from proxy code.
Whether sending bare 'undefined' (no || '' fallback) for X-Geo-* differs from the newer handlers' '' values in Funnelback-side handling.
endpoints.notes: Sends fewer headers than search-handler — no X-Original-Client-Ip, X-Real-Ip, or X-Request-ID. IP extraction inlined rather than delegated to commonUtils.

query_params.note: Client params spread first; hardcoded defaults below override matching keys.

query_params.name: collection
query_params.note: Always sent; overrides any client value (api/spelling.js:104).

query_params.name: profile
query_params.note: Always sent; overrides any client value (api/spelling.js:105).

query_params.name: form
query_params.note: Always sent; overrides any client value (api/spelling.js:106).

endpoints.response_transforms: Body returned to client unmodified (api/spelling.js:212). extractSpellingSuggestions (api/spelling.js:41-59) parses 'class="spelling">Did you mean:N<' for analytics only.

callers.context: Spelling-suggestions handler; routed at /proxy/funnelback/spelling per vercel.json:7.

gaps: Whether the spread-order difference vs server.js (defaults override client here, client overrides defaults there) is intentional cannot be determined from proxy code.
endpoints.notes: Constructs URLSearchParams object (api/spelling.js:102-107) and passes it as axios `params`. Sends fewer headers than search-handler — no X-Original-Client-Ip, X-Real-Ip, or X-Request-ID.

query_params.source: params: req.query — entire req.query object passed through to axios at api/suggest.js:421

endpoints.response_transforms: Coerced to array (api/suggest.js:434), then enrichSuggestions(responseData, req.query, requestId) at api/suggest.js:437 adds metadata to each suggestion. Cached as 'suggestions' keyspace at api/suggest.js:442-447.

callers.context: General autocomplete handler; routed at /proxy/funnelback/suggest per vercel.json:8.

gaps: Accept: text/html on .json endpoint — Funnelback requirement or vestige? Not determinable from proxy code.
endpoints.notes: Timeout constant FUNNELBACK_TIMEOUT_MS = 3000 (api/suggest.js:31), shorter than search/server/spelling/tools (5000).

query_params.name: query
query_params.note: Only client field forwarded; all other req.query keys discarded (api/suggestPeople.js:331-340).

query_params.name: collection
query_params.note: Note: people handler queries the sp-search (general) collection, not a people-specific one.

endpoints.response_transforms: Maps response.data.response.resultPacket.results to a flat array of person objects (api/suggestPeople.js:386 onward) with cleanTitle applied to several listMetadata fields. Sent to client as JSON.

callers.context: People-tab autocomplete handler; routed at /proxy/suggestPeople per vercel.json:9.

gaps: Accept: text/html on .json endpoint — same gap as suggest.
Whether discarding non-`query` fields from req.query (vs the pass-through handlers) is intentional.
endpoints.notes: URL is constructed at api/suggestPeople.js:340 by appending a hand-built query string to the base URL; axios is called with no `params` option (api/suggestPeople.js:373-376). Dead code: a URLSearchParams object is built at api/suggestPeople.js:322-328 and never used. Its values diverge from the wire form: line 326 says 'f.Tabs|seattleu|Eds-staff' (pipe + capital E + literal pipe); the queryString actually sent decodes to 'f.Tabs|seattleu~ds-staff' (pipe + tilde + lowercase d). The queryString form is authoritative.

Content-Type.note: Set on a GET request with no body — only handler that does this.

query_params.note: Client params spread first; hardcoded defaults below override matching keys.

query_params.name: collection
query_params.note: Always sent; overrides any client value.

query_params.name: profile
query_params.note: Always sent; overrides any client value.

query_params.name: form
query_params.note: Always sent; overrides any client value.

endpoints.response_transforms: Wraps response.data.response.resultPacket into { metadata: { totalResults, queryTime, searchTerm }, programs: [...] } (api/suggestPrograms.js:407-433). cleanProgramTitle applied to titles. Sent to client as JSON.

callers.context: Programs-tab autocomplete handler; routed at /proxy/suggestPrograms per vercel.json:10.

gaps: Whether Content-Type: application/json on a GET (no body) has any effect on Funnelback's handling.
Whether num_ranks: 5 (number) vs '5' (string in suggest-people) produces different behavior.
endpoints.notes: Only handler that sends Accept: application/json. Hardcoded collection differs from the other handlers (seattleu~ds-programs vs seattleu~sp-search).

query_params.name: path
query_params.note: Used to construct URL path slot (api/tools.js:81); empty string fallback yields a request to .../s/. Also still present in `params: req.query` passed to axios — sent twice, once in URL path and once as a query parameter.

query_params.source: params: req.query — entire req.query passed through (api/tools.js:102)

callers.context: Funnelback 'tools' surface; routed at /proxy/funnelback/tools per vercel.json:6. Per CLAUDE.md, provides functionality that is part of the working search system end users see.

gaps: req.query.path values are not enumerable from proxy code — FE-side audit out of scope.
Whether sending `path` both in URL path and as query parameter is intended.
endpoints.notes: Sends fewer headers than search-handler — no X-Original-Client-Ip, X-Real-Ip, or X-Request-ID. IP extraction inlined rather than delegated to commonUtils.

out_of_inventory.reason_excluded: Not wired in vercel.json; CLAUDE.md flags as 'dead file, never wired in.' Documented for grep-completeness only.
out_of_inventory.shape_summary: GET; Accept: application/json; only X-Forwarded-For header beyond Accept; no timeout option set on axios call.

out_of_inventory.reason_excluded: Not a Funnelback endpoint; out of scope. Mentioned because grep for 'axios.' matched.
fetch() forwards inbound request through Vercel's edge chain to matching /api/* handler. Not a Funnelback call.

global_gaps: Funnelback-side authoritative requirements for which fields are required vs optional are not derivable from proxy code.
Whether host 'dxp-us-search.funnelback.squiz.cloud' is environment-specific (dev vs prod) is not derivable — no env-var indirection observed; URL is a literal in every handler.
FE-side caller behavior — including the set of req.query fields actually sent and the values of req.query.path for tools — is out of scope per the audit brief.
